steps.title: Compare the environments
steps.content: The sentence before the blank describes tropical forests as humid with closely spaced trees. The next sentence describes savannas as drier with trees farther apart.

steps.title: Pick the comparison signal
steps.content: Choice A would introduce an example, but savannas are not an example of tropical forests. Choice C signals the first item in a sequence, and Choice D signals a conclusion. The relationship is a side-by-side comparison of two environments. The answer is B.
